summary: Tested Personal SMS Fix - verified the critical bug fix where SMS protocol handler was moved to execute SYNCHRONOUSLY before any async operations to preserve user gesture context on mobile browsers. Backend APIs pass 100%, frontend SMS mode UI verified working correctly.

integration_issues.flow: Review Links Modal - iMOs review option
integration_issues.issue: iMOs review option not showing despite store having slug 'imos-demo'. The storeSlug state is not being set properly. The loadReviewLinks useEffect dependency was fixed to include [user] but issue persists. May be related to async timing or API response.

personal_sms_mode.details: User forest@imosapp.com has no mvpline_number, Personal SMS mode active
ui_indicators: Personal SMS hint: 'Tap send to open your SMS app with message ready to go'
Send button is ORANGE (rgb(255, 149, 0)) indicating personal SMS mode

sms_fix_verified_in_code.details: handleSend() function in thread/[id].tsx lines 656-675 - SMS protocol handler now fires SYNCHRONOUSLY before any await/setTimeout calls to preserve user gesture context on mobile browsers

contact_detail_sms_quick_action.details: SMS button on contact detail navigates to /thread/{id} with mode=sms and contact_phone parameters

message_composer.details: Can type messages, send button visible and styled correctly for personal SMS mode

toolbar_buttons.templates: WORKING - Opens modal, shows 'No templates yet' (expected - user has none)
toolbar_buttons.review_links: PARTIAL - Modal opens but iMOs option not showing (see integration issues)
toolbar_buttons.business_card: NOT TESTED DEEPLY - Button exists with data-testid='business-card-btn'

backend_api_channel_parameter.details: POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} correctly accepts and preserves channel='sms_personal' parameter

action_items: INVESTIGATE: iMOs review link not showing in review modal despite store having slug. The loadReviewLinks function fetches store info via /api/admin/stores/{store_id} but storeSlug state remains null. May need to debug the async flow or verify the store_id is present on the user object in the React context.
NOTE: The critical SMS fix (moving protocol handler before async calls) is correctly implemented in the code. The actual opening of native SMS app can only be verified on a real mobile device.
critical_code_review_comments: Code fix confirmed: handleSend() in thread/[id].tsx lines 656-675 now opens SMS app IMMEDIATELY before any async operations
The iMOs review link code uses setMessage() for pre-fill (line 2100-2104) instead of handleSend() for auto-send - this is correct
loadReviewLinks useEffect dependency array was updated from [] to [user] to fix timing issue

success_rate.frontend: 85% (most features working, iMOs review link has issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and contacts
context_for_next_testing_agent: The critical SMS fix has been verified in the code. The iMOs review link not appearing is a separate issue related to storeSlug state not being set - the useEffect for loadReviewLinks was updated but the issue persists. The store API returns slug='imos-demo' so the data is available. Twilio SMS is MOCKED - personal SMS fallback is the primary working flow.

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: MOCKED - uses personal SMS fallback instead
